source: WSET L3 Specification – Learning Outcomes, Assessment Criteria, Example Questions
note: Command verbs extracted from specification learning outcomes, assessment criteria, and example exam questions. Detailed per-verb files are in knowledge/command-verbs/.

verbs.expected_response: Name or list the item(s) without necessarily explaining
verbs.mark_expectation: 1 mark per correct identification; no elaboration required
verbs.common_in: MCQ questions; first part of multi-part short-answer questions

verbs.expected_response: Give characteristics, properties, or features with appropriate detail
verbs.mark_expectation: Multiple marks; each correct characteristic earns marks
verbs.common_in: SAT wine descriptions; regional wine style questions

verbs.expected_response: Give reasons or mechanisms; show cause-and-effect understanding
verbs.mark_expectation: Higher marks; requires causal reasoning not just naming
verbs.example: Explique por qué un productor optaría por utilizar el sistema de espaldera.

verbs.expected_response: Name the item AND give its characteristics
verbs.mark_expectation: Split marks: some for identification, more for descriptive detail
verbs.common_in: Regional questions requiring both location and style description

verbs.expected_response: Give a quality level (defective/poor/acceptable/good/very good/excellent) with justification from tasting observations
verbs.mark_expectation: 1 mark; must select correct level from the SAT scale

verbs.expected_response: Name a specific wine or wine type and justify the choice based on given criteria
verbs.mark_expectation: Marks for specific wine name AND justification reason
verbs.common_in: Part 2 short-answer Q3/Q4 service and recommendation scenarios

verbs.expected_response: Use RA1 knowledge (viticulture/vinification) to explain the style/quality of a specific regional wine
verbs.mark_expectation: Marks for correctly connecting general principles to specific region/wine
verbs.common_in: RA2 assessment criteria explicitly require applying RA1 knowledge to regional wines
